title: RBI launches the May 2026 round of Urban Consumer Confidence Survey
description: The Reserve Bank of India has been regularly conducting Urban Consumer Confidence Survey (UCCS). The May 2026 round of the survey is being launched. The survey seeks qualitative responses from households, regarding their sentiments on general economic situation, employment scenario, price level, households’ income and spending. The survey is conducted regularly in 19 cities, viz., Ahmedabad, Bengaluru, Bhopal, Bhubaneswar, Chandigarh, Chennai, Delhi, Guwahati, Hyderabad, Jaipur, Jammu, Kol
